title: Ubiquiti UDB-Switch, UniFi 2.5G PoE switch with Wi-Fi 7 bridge
category: Ubiquiti / LAN networks / Switches / PoE Switches
description: Ubiquiti Device Bridge Switch is a 2.5Gbit UniFi PoE switch with support for wireless Wi-Fi 7 uplink , (1) 10Gbit PoE+ port , (7) 2.5Gbit PoE+ ports and a PoE budget of up to 185W *. The maximum power consumption of the device is 25W (without PoE load) (1) 10Gbit PoE+ port and (7) 2.5Gbit PoE+ ports 802.3af/at PoE+ with up to 30W/port and a total budget of 185W *when using a 210W power adapter (35W budget with the included 60W adapter) STR MLO enables simultaneous, aggregated use of the 5GHz and 6GHz bands, providing full-duplex connectivity and significantly higher throughput Dual-band Wi-Fi 7 (802.11be) bridge with STR MLO support and total throughput of up to 10.1Gbps (6Ghz + 5Ghz) UniFi Wi-Fi Auto-Link for automatic connection to UniFi APs Device Power adapter 54V/1.1A Wall-mount kit The UDB-Switch does not include a web interface but is centrally managed through the UniFi Network Server with support for the UniFi mobile app. The UniFi Network Server and mobile app allow administrators to configure and monitor nearly all switch functions through a graphical user interface from anywhere
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 5 + 6 GHz (dual band) WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11ac, 802.11ax, 802.11be 5GHz MIMO 2 x 2 6GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 100M/1G/2.5G/5G/10G + (7) 100/1000/2500Mbps Other features LCD display Power Power type DC connector PoE type PoE-Out (only) PoE-Out standards 802.3af, 802.3at PoE Out ports 8 PoE budget [W] 185 Max. power consumption [W] 210 Power via connector/terminal 54V DC Physical characteristics Design On the wall, Desktop Fans No Chassis design Plastic Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 30 up to 40 Weight [g] 548 Width [mm] 213 Height [mm] 33 Depth [mm] 113
